summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Nagarik web application. All frontend UI scaffolds working correctly with proper navigation, mock data display, and user interactions. Backend API health check successful.
passed_tests: Backend API health check at /api/ returns JSON response
Login page loads with Family/Operator tabs and proper form elements
Family Dashboard loads with sidebar navigation, user status card (Kamla Ji), health metrics, medicine schedule, recent activity
Operator Console loads with dashboard stats (Active Incidents: 3, Users Online: 127), active incidents table, user management interface
Navigation between Family Dashboard pages works (Overview, Activity, Health, Alerts, Settings)
Navigation between Operator Console pages works (Dashboard, Incidents, Users, Settings)
Auto-redirect from root URL to /family works correctly
Login navigation to both Family Dashboard and Operator Console works
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for automated testing
Professional UI design with Nagarik branding displayed correctly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (3/3 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all UI components and navigation flows working)
